---
title: "People"
---

The team behind the NSW Child E Cohort Program. *[Investigators, staff, and students below are placeholders — replace with real team information.]*

## Program Lead

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/kathleen-falster.jpg)

<div>
### Associate Professor Kathleen Falster
<p class="role">Program Lead</p>
PhD, MPH, BAppSc(Hons). An epidemiologist with expertise in translational research, linked administrative data, and data analytics, based in the School of Population Health, Faculty of Medicine & Health, UNSW Sydney. Leads the NSW Child E-Cohort Research Program, informing policy and service delivery to improve outcomes for children and families across the health, child protection, education, and social sectors in NSW and nationally.

**Research interests:** population health epidemiology; administrative data linkage and analytics; child health and development outcomes; Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander health inequities; child protection system involvement; early childhood development; maternal and perinatal health.

**Contact:** [k.falster@unsw.edu.au](mailto:k.falster@unsw.edu.au) · [UNSW profile](https://www.unsw.edu.au/staff/kathleen-falster) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cITTuZMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kathleen-falster-a8776a151/)
</div>
:::

## Investigators

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Chief Investigator</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Associate Investigator</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

:::

## Staff & Students

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Postdoctoral Fellow</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">PhD Candidate</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

:::
